title: Cobblemon Ultimate Ascension
description:
CREDIT TO COBBLEMON

The Ultimate cobblemon modpack! with mega evolution, fishing, breeding, tm's, max level of 150 and so so much more!

This is the Best Modpack for cobblemon, why choose anything other than the best?
body:
Adds late game to cobblemon! With a ton of mods to make your end game better!

Cobblemon Related stuff
---------------------------------
*** MEGA evolution (ascension megamons!)
* Maximum of 50 boxes
* Max level of 150! **
* LEGENDARY encounters!
* Cobblepedia
* Increased shiny rates
* Missing Pokemon!
* BREEDING!
* Cobblemon loot in Vanilla Structures
* More! 

Other mods!
-----------------
* Farmers Delight
* Better Nether (and end)
* Spelunkery
* Waystones
* Wilder Wild
* Xaero's Map!

All these mods and changes, are the best for your cobblemon adventure. So much new content to explore! Its the Ultimate Cobblemon Pack!
